title: Cakeworks
description: A revamp of how cakes are made
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d3cc8aa6dc14487235e8743a830c81a82d0949_0.webp)

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c37d42a6a2ac69040b0fa6df5a85e4300b2cd925.png) 📖 **About:** 🍰 Cakeworks is a mod that reworks cake preparation into a more interactive and engaging process. By introducing dough, cake bases and icing, it turns baking into a proper craft letting you become a true pastry chef. With support for Neapolitan flavors, Cakeworks adds depth and personality to one of the game’s most iconic foods. ![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c37d42a6a2ac69040b0fa6df5a85e4300b2cd925.png) 📦 **Cross-Compatibility:** - [Amendmends](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) Adds the ability to cover a double block of cake base with icing; - [Neapolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan) Add Vanilla, Strawberry, Chocolate, Banana, Mint And Adzuki Icing;
